functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { uint16_t regValue; uint32_t baud; // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(bitRate <= (sysclkHz / 4U)); ASSERT((sysclkHz / bitRate) <= 128U); ASSERT((dataWidth >= 1U) && (dataWidth <= 16U)); ASSERT((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) & SPI_CCR_SPISWRESET) == 0U); // // Set polarity and data width. // regValue = (((uint16_t)protocol << 6U) & SPI_CCR_CLKPOLARITY) | (dataWidth - 1U); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CCR_CLKPOLARITY | SPI_CCR_SPICHAR_M))) | regValue; // // Set the mode and phase. // regValue = (uint16_t)mode | (((uint16_t)protocol << 2U) & SPI_CTL_CLK_PHASE); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CTL_TALK | SPI_CTL_CONTROLLER_PERIPHERAL | SPI_CTL_CLK_PHASE))) | regValue; // // Set the clock. // baud = (sysclkHz / bitRate) - 1U; HWREGH(base + SPI_O_BRR) = (uint16_t)baud; }

{ uint32_t baud; // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(bitRate <= (sysclkHz / 4U)); ASSERT((sysclkHz / bitRate) <= 128U); // // Set the clock. // baud = (sysclkHz / bitRate) - 1U; HWREGH(base + SPI_O_BRR) = (uint16_t)baud; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable the specified non-FIFO interrupts. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_DATA_TX_EMPTY) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) |= SPI_CTL_SPIINTENA; } if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_OVERRUN) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) |= SPI_CTL_OVERRUNINTENA; } // // Enable the specified FIFO-mode interrupts. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_TXFF) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) |= SPI_FFTX_TXFFIENA; } if((intFlags & (SPI_INT_RXFF | SPI_INT_RXFF_OVERFLOW)) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) |= SPI_FFRX_RXFFIENA; } }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable the specified non-FIFO interrupts. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_DATA_TX_EMPTY) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CTL_SPIINTENA)); } if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_OVERRUN) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CTL_OVERRUNINTENA)); } // // Disable the specified FIFO-mode interrupts. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_TXFF) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFTX_TXFFIENA)); } if((intFlags & (SPI_INT_RXFF | SPI_INT_RXFF_OVERFLOW)) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFRX_RXFFIENA)); } }

{ uint32_t temp = 0U; // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get non-FIFO interrupt statuses. // if((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_STS) & SPI_STS_INT_FLAG) != 0U) { temp |= SPI_INT_RX_DATA_TX_EMPTY; } if((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_STS) & SPI_STS_OVERRUN_FLAG) != 0U) { temp |= SPI_INT_RX_OVERRUN; } // // Get FIFO interrupt statuses. // if((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) & SPI_FFTX_TXFFINT) != 0U) { temp |= SPI_INT_TXFF; } if((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) & SPI_FFRX_RXFFINT) != 0U) { temp |= SPI_INT_RXFF; } if((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) & SPI_FFRX_RXFFOVF) != 0U) { temp |= SPI_INT_RXFF_OVERFLOW; } return(temp); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the specified non-FIFO interrupt sources. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_DATA_TX_EMPTY) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CCR_SPISWRESET)); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) |= (uint16_t)SPI_CCR_SPISWRESET; } if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RX_OVERRUN) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_STS) = SPI_STS_OVERRUN_FLAG; } // // Clear the specified FIFO-mode interrupt sources. // if((intFlags & SPI_INT_TXFF) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) |= SPI_FFTX_TXFFINTCLR; } if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RXFF) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) |= SPI_FFRX_RXFFINTCLR; } if((intFlags & SPI_INT_RXFF_OVERFLOW) != 0U) { HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) |= SPI_FFRX_RXFFOVFCLR; } }

{ uint16_t rxData; ASSERT(((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) & SPI_CCR_SPICHAR_M) + 1U) == charLength); ASSERT(data < ((uint32_t)1U << charLength)); // // Write to SPI Transmit buffer // SPI_writeDataBlockingNonFIFO(base, data << (16U - charLength)); // // Read SPI Receive buffer // rxData = SPI_readDataBlockingNonFIFO(base); return(rxData); }

{ ASSERT(((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) & SPI_CCR_SPICHAR_M) + 1U) == charLength); // // Reset the TX / RX FIFO buffers to default state // SPI_disableFIFO(base); // Disable FIFO register SPI_enableFIFO(base); // Enable FIFO register // // Configure the FIFO Transmit Delay // SPI_setTxFifoTransmitDelay(base, txDelay); // // Determine the number of 16-level words from number of words to be // transmitted / received // uint16_t numOfSixteenWords = numOfWords / (uint16_t)SPI_FIFO_TXFULL; // // Determine the number of remaining words from number of words to be // transmitted / received // uint16_t remainingWords = numOfWords % (uint16_t)SPI_FIFO_TXFULL; uint16_t count = 0; uint16_t i = 0; uint16_t txBuffer_pos = 0; uint16_t rxBuffer_pos = 0; uint16_t tempBuf; // To store read value if pRxBuffer is NULL // // Number of transactions is based on numOfSixteenWords // Each transaction will transmit and receive 16 words. // while(count < numOfSixteenWords) { // // Fill-up the SPI Transmit FIFO buffers // for(i = 1U; i <= (uint16_t)SPI_FIFO_TXFULL; i++) { SPI_writeDataBlockingFIFO(base, pTxBuffer[txBuffer_pos] << (16U - charLength)); txBuffer_pos++; } // // Wait till SPI Receive FIFO buffer is full // while(SPI_getRxFIFOStatus(base) < SPI_FIFO_RXFULL) { } // // Read the SPI Receive FIFO buffers // for(i = 1U; i <= (uint16_t)SPI_FIFO_RXFULL; i++) { if(pRxBuffer == NULL) { tempBuf = SPI_readDataBlockingFIFO(base); UNUSED_DRIVERLIB(tempBuf); } else { pRxBuffer[rxBuffer_pos] = SPI_readDataBlockingFIFO(base); rxBuffer_pos++; } } count++; } // // Number of transactions is based on remainingWords // for(i = 0U; i < remainingWords; i++) { SPI_writeDataBlockingFIFO(base, pTxBuffer[txBuffer_pos] << (16U - charLength)); txBuffer_pos++; } // // Wait till SPI Receive FIFO buffer remaining words // while((uint16_t)SPI_getRxFIFOStatus(base) < remainingWords) { } // // Read the SPI Receive FIFO buffers // for(i = 0; i < remainingWords; i++) { if(pRxBuffer == NULL) { tempBuf = SPI_readDataBlockingFIFO(base); UNUSED_DRIVERLIB(tempBuf); } else { pRxBuffer[rxBuffer_pos] = SPI_readDataBlockingFIFO(base); rxBuffer_pos++; } } // // Disable SPI FIFO // SPI_disableFIFO(base); }

{ uint8_t i; uint16_t rxBuffer[3]; uint16_t txBuffer[3]; ASSERT(data < ((uint32_t)1U << 24U)); // // Empty Receive buffer // for(i = 0U; i < 3U; i++) { rxBuffer[i] = 0U; } // // Fill Transmit buffer with appropriate data // txBuffer[0] = (uint16_t)(data >> 16U); // data[23:16] txBuffer[1] = (uint16_t)(data) >> 8U; // data[15:8] txBuffer[2] = (uint16_t)(data) & 0x00FFU; // data[7:0] // // Three 8-bits make a 24-bit // Character length = 8 // number of bytes = 3 // SPI_pollingFIFOTransaction(base, 8U, txBuffer, rxBuffer, 3U, txDelay); }

{ uint8_t i; uint16_t txBuffer[2]; uint16_t rxBuffer[2]; uint16_t rxData = 0U; ASSERT(dummyData <= 0xFFU); // // Empty Transmit buffer // for(i = 0U; i < 2U; i++) { txBuffer[i] = dummyData; rxBuffer[i] = 0U; } // // Send dummy words to receive data from peripheral // Two 8-bits make a 16-bit // Character length = 8 // number of bytes = 2 // SPI_pollingFIFOTransaction(base, 8U, txBuffer, rxBuffer, 2U, txDelay); if(endianness == SPI_DATA_LITTLE_ENDIAN) { // // LITTLE_ENDIAN // rxData = (rxBuffer[1] << 8) | rxBuffer[0]; } else { // // BIG_ENDIAN // rxData = (rxBuffer[0] << 8) | rxBuffer[1]; } return(rxData); }

{ uint8_t i; uint16_t txBuffer[3]; uint16_t rxBuffer[3]; uint32_t rxData = 0; ASSERT(dummyData <= 0xFFU); // // Empty Transmit buffer // for(i = 0U; i < 3U; i++) { txBuffer[i] = dummyData; rxBuffer[i] = 0U; } // // Send dummy words to receive data from peripheral // Three 8-bits make a 24-bit // Character length = 8 // number of bytes = 3 // SPI_pollingFIFOTransaction(base, 8U, txBuffer, rxBuffer, 3U, txDelay); if(endianness == SPI_DATA_LITTLE_ENDIAN) { // // LITTLE_ENDIAN // rxData = ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[2] << 16) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[1] << 8) | (uint32_t)rxBuffer[0]; } else { // // BIG_ENDIAN // rxData = ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[0] << 16) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[1] << 8) | (uint32_t)rxBuffer[2]; } return(rxData); }

{ uint8_t i; uint16_t txBuffer[2]; uint16_t rxBuffer[2]; // // Empty Receive buffer // for(i = 0U; i < 2U; i++) { rxBuffer[i] = 0U; } // // Fill Transmit buffer with appropriate data // txBuffer[0] = (uint16_t)(data >> 16U); // data[31:16] txBuffer[1] = (uint16_t)(data); // data[15:0] // // Two 16-bits make a 32-bit // Character length = 16 // number of bytes = 2 // SPI_pollingFIFOTransaction(base, 16U, txBuffer, rxBuffer, 2U, txDelay); }

{ uint8_t i; uint16_t txBuffer[4]; uint16_t rxBuffer[4]; uint32_t rxData = 0U; ASSERT(dummyData <= 0xFFU); // // Empty Transmit buffer // for(i = 0U; i < 4U; i++) { txBuffer[i] = dummyData; rxBuffer[i] = 0U; } // // Send dummy words to receive data from peripheral // Four 8-bits make a 32-bit // Character length = 8 // number of bytes = 4 // SPI_pollingFIFOTransaction(base, 8U, txBuffer, rxBuffer, 4U, txDelay); if(endianness == SPI_DATA_LITTLE_ENDIAN) { // // LITTLE_ENDIAN // rxData = ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[3] << 24U) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[2] << 16U) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[1] << 8U) | (uint32_t)rxBuffer[0]; } else { // // BIG_ENDIAN // rxData = ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[0] << 24U) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[1] << 16U) | ((uint32_t)rxBuffer[2] << 8U) | (uint32_t)rxBuffer[3]; } return(rxData); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Enable the FIFO. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) |= SPI_FFTX_SPIFFENA | SPI_FFTX_TXFIFO; HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) |= SPI_FFRX_RXFIFORESET; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Disable the FIFO. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFTX_SPIFFENA | SPI_FFTX_TXFIFO)); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFRX_RXFIFORESET)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Reset the TX FIFO. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFTX_TXFIFO)); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) |= (uint16_t)SPI_FFTX_TXFIFO; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Reset the RX FIFO. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFRX_RXFIFORESET)); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) |= SPI_FFRX_RXFIFORESET; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the FIFO interrupt levels. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFTX_TXFFIL_M))) | (uint16_t)txLevel; HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFRX_RXFFIL_M))) | (uint16_t)rxLevel; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Extract the transmit and receive FIFO levels. // *txLevel = (SPI_TxFIFOLevel)((uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) & SPI_FFTX_TXFFIL_M)); *rxLevel = (SPI_RxFIFOLevel)((uint16_t)(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) & SPI_FFRX_RXFFIL_M)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the current FIFO status // return((SPI_TxFIFOLevel)((uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) & SPI_FFTX_TXFFST_M) >> SPI_FFTX_TXFFST_S))); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Get the current FIFO status // return((SPI_RxFIFOLevel)((uint16_t)((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFRX) & SPI_FFRX_RXFFST_M) >> SPI_FFRX_RXFFST_S))); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Determine if the SPI is busy. // return((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) & SPI_FFTX_TXFFST_M) != 0U); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write data to the transmit buffer. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_TXBUF) = data; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Check for data to read. // return(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_RXBUF)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Wait until space is available in the receive FIFO. // while(SPI_getTxFIFOStatus(base) == SPI_FIFO_TXFULL) { } // // Write data to the transmit buffer. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_TXBUF) = data; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Wait until data is available in the receive FIFO. // while(SPI_getRxFIFOStatus(base) == SPI_FIFO_RXEMPTY) { } // // Check for data to read. // return(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_RXBUF)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Wait until the transmit buffer is not full. // while((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_STS) & SPI_STS_BUFFULL_FLAG) != 0U) { } // // Write data to the transmit buffer. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_TXBUF) = data; }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Wait until data has been received. // while((HWREGH(base + SPI_O_STS) & SPI_STS_INT_FLAG) == 0U) { } // // Check for data to read. // return(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_RXBUF)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the tri-wire bit to enable 3-wire mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) |= SPI_PRI_TRIWIRE; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the tri-wire bit to disable 3-wire mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_PRI_TRIWIRE)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the bit that enables loopback mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) |= SPI_CCR_SPILBK; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the bit that enables loopback mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CCR_SPILBK)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write the polarity of the SPIPTE signal to the register. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_PRI_PTEINV))) | (uint16_t)polarity; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the bit that enables high speed mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) |= SPI_CCR_HS_MODE; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the bit that enables high speed mode. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CCR) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CCR_HS_MODE)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write the desired emulation mode to the register. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) = (HWREGH(base + SPI_O_PRI) & (uint16_t)(~(SPI_PRI_FREE | SPI_PRI_SOFT))) | (uint16_t)mode; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); ASSERT(delay <= 0xFFU); // // Configure the FIFO Transmit Delay Bits // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFCT) = delay; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Return Emulation Buffer Received Data // return(HWREGH(base + SPI_O_RXEMU)); }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Set the TALK bit // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) |= SPI_CTL_TALK; }
{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Clear the TALK bit // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_CTL) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_CTL_TALK)); }

{ // // Check the arguments. // ASSERT(SPI_isBaseValid(base)); // // Write to SPIRST bit the TX FIFO. // HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) &= (uint16_t)(~(SPI_FFTX_SPIRST)); HWREGH(base + SPI_O_FFTX) |= (uint16_t)SPI_FFTX_SPIRST; }
